info.title: Revive API
info.description: Backend API for the Revive platform — pre-sale renovation management, property analysis, deal tracking, and more.

get.description:
`GET /health`

Returns the current health status of the API. No authentication required. Use this to verify API connectivity.

parameters.name: uid
parameters.description: Firebase UID of the admin user (e.g., 'abc123def456').

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/admins/email/{uid}`

Updates the email address for an admin user identified by their Firebase UID.

parameters.name: uid
parameters.description: Firebase UID of the admin user.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/admins/{uid}`

Updates profile fields for an admin user. All fields are optional — only included fields are updated.

agentId.description: HubSpot contact ID for the agent.

after.description: Cursor for pagination — pass the last opportunity ID from the previous page.

isLost.description: When true, returns only lost/closed opportunities. Defaults to false.

startDate.description: Unix timestamp (ms) — only return opportunities created on or after this date.

separateByDealType.description: When true, groups results by deal type.

post.description:
`POST /v1/agents/get-opportunities`

Retrieves deal opportunities for a specific agent. Supports pagination, filtering by deal type, date range, and status.

limit.description: Max results to return. Defaults to 25.

search.description: Query string — matches agent name, email, or brokerage.

post.description:
`POST /v1/agents/search`

Search for agents by name, email, or other criteria. Returns a paginated list.

parameters.name: agentId
parameters.description: HubSpot contact ID for the agent.

get.description:
`GET /v1/agents/{agentId}`

Retrieves a single agent record by their unique agent ID.

`GET /v1/app-config/feature-flags/{app}`

Returns all active feature flags for the specified application platform.

post.description:
`POST /v1/app-config/feature-flags/{app}`

Creates feature flag configuration for the specified application platform.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/app-config/feature-flags/{app}`

Updates feature flag values for the specified platform. Only included flags are modified.

put.description:
`PUT /v1/app-config/feature-flags/{app}`

Replaces the entire feature flag configuration for the specified platform.

post.description:
`POST /v1/auth/login`

Authenticates a user with Firebase credentials and returns session information including user role and profile.

`POST /v1/auth/register`

Registers a new user account with Firebase credentials and creates the corresponding platform profile.

`POST /v1/avm/`

Runs an automated valuation model (AVM) for a property address. Returns estimated value based on comparables, market trends, and property data.

get.description:
`GET /v1/broadcast/`

Returns all broadcast messages with optional filtering by status and type.

post.description:
`POST /v1/broadcast/create`

Creates a new broadcast message for sending to a targeted audience via email, SMS, or push notification.

get.description:
`GET /v1/broadcast/read/{id}`

Retrieves a single broadcast message by ID including delivery status and recipient details.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/broadcast/{id}`

Updates a broadcast message. Only draft broadcasts can be modified.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/broadcast/{id}`

Deletes a broadcast message.

post.description:
`POST /v1/brokerages/`

Creates a new real estate brokerage record.

`POST /v1/brokerages/associate/{companyId}`

Links a brokerage to a HubSpot company record.

`POST /v1/brokerages/get-associate`

Retrieves the brokerage-to-company association for a given brokerage or company.

get.description:
`GET /v1/brokerages/public`

Returns publicly visible brokerage records for use in agent-facing UIs and directories.

post.description:
`POST /v1/brokerages/search`

Searches brokerages by name, location, or other criteria.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/brokerages/{companyId}`

Updates brokerage fields using the associated HubSpot company ID.

get.description:
`GET /v1/brokerages/{companyId}`

Retrieves a brokerage record by its associated HubSpot company ID.

post.description:
`POST /v1/case-studies/search`

Searches published case studies by address, deal type, or profit range.

`POST /v1/contacts/`

Creates a new contact record. Contacts can be associated with deals and opportunities. Syncs to HubSpot.

get.description:
`GET /v1/contacts/dashboard`

Returns aggregated contact metrics and summary data for the admin dashboard.

post.description:
`POST /v1/contacts/edge-view`

Generates an Edge (agent-facing property report) view link for a contact.

`POST /v1/contacts/invite`

Sends an invitation to a contact to view their property report or schedule an onsite visit.

`POST /v1/contacts/merge`

Merges two duplicate contact records into one, combining associated deals and history.

`POST /v1/contacts/remove-from-deal`

Removes the association between a contact and a deal.

`POST /v1/contacts/search`

Search for contacts by name, email, phone, or other fields. Returns paginated results.

get.description:
`GET /v1/contacts/{contactId}`

Retrieves a contact by ID, including associated deals and opportunities.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/contacts/{contactId}`

Updates fields on an existing contact. Only included fields are modified.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/contacts/{contactId}`

Deletes a contact record.

get.description:
`GET /v1/contacts/{contactId}/edge-view`

Retrieves the Edge (agent-facing report) view data for a contact.

`GET /v1/contacts/{contactId}/homes`

Returns all home records associated with a contact.

`GET /v1/contacts/{contactId}/referrals`

Returns referral records associated with a contact.

post.description:
`POST /v1/contractors/`

Creates a new contractor profile. Contractors are assigned to renovation projects and can submit weekly updates.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/contractors/`

Updates multiple contractor records in a single request.

get.description:
`GET /v1/contractors/`

Returns all registered contractors with optional filtering.

post.description:
`POST /v1/contractors/associate/{companyId}`

Links a contractor to a HubSpot company record.

`POST /v1/contractors/atlist`

Returns contractors available for assignment based on location, specialty, and availability.

`POST /v1/contractors/get-association`

Retrieves the contractor-to-company association for a given contractor or company.

`POST /v1/contractors/import`

Bulk imports contractor records from a CSV or structured data payload.

get.description:
`GET /v1/contractors/opportunity/{opportunityId}`

Retrieves the contractor assigned to a specific opportunity.

post.description:
`POST /v1/contractors/search`

Searches contractors by name, company, specialty, or location.

get.description:
`GET /v1/contractors/{contractorId}`

Retrieves a contractor profile by ID, including assigned projects and status.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/contractors/{contractorId}`

Updates fields on a contractor profile.

post.description:
`POST /v1/contractors/{contractorId}/files`

Uploads a document (license, insurance, W-9, etc.) to a contractor's profile.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/contractors/{contractorId}/files/{type}`

Deletes a specific document type from a contractor's profile.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/contractors/{contractorId}/set-primary-contact`

Sets the primary contact person for a contractor company.

post.description:
`POST /v1/contracts/`

Creates a new contract document via PandaDoc. Returns the contract ID and edit session.

get.description:
`GET /v1/contracts/download/{contractId}`

Downloads a contract document as a PDF file.

`GET /v1/contracts/edit-session/{contractId}`

Creates or retrieves an edit session for a contract document.

`GET /v1/contracts/send-for-signature/{contractId}`

Sends a contract to all recipients for e-signature via PandaDoc.

`GET /v1/contracts/session/{contractId}`

Retrieves the current session (edit or signing) for a contract.

`GET /v1/contracts/signing-links/{documentId}`

Returns direct signing URLs for each recipient of a contract document.

post.description:
`POST /v1/contracts/webhook/complete`

Handles PandaDoc webhook when a contract is fully signed. Updates deal status and triggers downstream workflows.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/contracts/{contractId}`

Deletes a contract document. Only draft contracts can be deleted.

post.description:
`POST /v1/esignatures/{dealId}`

Creates a new PandaDoc e-signature document for a deal and initiates the signing workflow.

`POST /v1/estimates/`

Creates a new renovation estimate for a property with line items from the product catalog.

get.description:
`GET /v1/estimates/approve/{estimateId}`

Marks an estimate as approved by the homeowner or agent, advancing it to the next workflow stage.

post.description:
`POST /v1/estimates/complete/{estimateId}`

Marks an estimate as complete and triggers document generation and contract creation.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/estimates/create-document/{estimateId}`

Generates a PandaDoc document from an estimate for review and signing.

`PATCH /v1/estimates/delete-contract/{estimateId}`

Removes the PandaDoc contract associated with an estimate, allowing re-generation.

post.description:
`POST /v1/estimates/duplicate`

Creates a copy of an existing estimate with all line items. The duplicate starts in draft status.

`POST /v1/estimates/generation`

Auto-generates an estimate using product catalog templates based on property condition and scope.

`POST /v1/estimates/migrate-products`

Internal migration — updates estimate line items to use the latest product catalog entries.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/estimates/reset/{estimateId}`

Resets an estimate back to draft status. Cleans up associated project scope and unlinks documents.

`PATCH /v1/estimates/save/{estimateId}`

Saves the current state of an estimate including line items, notes, and pricing without changing status.

post.description:
`POST /v1/estimates/search`

Searches estimates by deal, status, date range, or other criteria. Returns paginated results.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/estimates/send-for-signature/{estimateId}`

Sends the estimate document to the homeowner and agent for e-signature via PandaDoc.

post.description:
`POST /v1/estimates/sort-custom-products`

Reorders custom (non-catalog) line items within an estimate.

`POST /v1/estimates/sort-products`

Reorders catalog line items within an estimate.

get.description:
`GET /v1/estimates/{estimateId}`

Retrieves an estimate by ID including all line items, pricing, status, and change order history.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/estimates/{estimateId}`

Updates an estimate — modify line items, pricing, status, or other fields.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/estimates/{estimateId}`

Deletes an estimate. Only draft estimates can be deleted.

get.description:
`GET /v1/estimates/{estimateId}/proposal`

Retrieves the formatted proposal view of an estimate for client presentation.

parameters.name: uid
parameters.description: Firebase UID of the user to remove.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/estimates/{estimateId}/{uid}`

Removes a user's access to an estimate.

post.description:
`POST /v1/follow-up-boss/activate`

Activates the Follow Up Boss CRM integration for the authenticated account.

`POST /v1/follow-up-boss/connect-users`

Maps Revive platform users to their Follow Up Boss counterparts for data sync.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/follow-up-boss/deactivate`

Deactivates the Follow Up Boss CRM integration and stops data sync.

get.description:
`GET /v1/follow-up-boss/get-user-pipelines`

Returns the pipeline configuration from the connected Follow Up Boss account.

get.summary: Get Follow Up Boss sync logs
get.description:
`GET /v1/follow-up-boss/logs`

Returns recent sync activity logs for the Follow Up Boss integration.

post.description:
`POST /v1/follow-up-boss/webhook`

Handles incoming webhook events from Follow Up Boss for real-time data sync.

get.description:
`GET /v1/homes/{dealId}`

Retrieves the home record associated with a deal.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/homes/{dealId}`

Updates the home record associated with a deal.

put.description:
`PUT /v1/homes/{dealId}/associate`

Links a home record to a deal.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/homes/{dealId}/associate`

Removes the link between a home record and a deal.

post.description:
`POST /v1/homes/{dealId}/note`

Adds a note to the home record associated with a deal.

`POST /v1/marketing-center/automation/agent`

Triggers automated marketing material generation for an agent's listings.

`POST /v1/marketing-center/automation/opportunity`

Triggers automated marketing material generation for a specific opportunity.

`POST /v1/marketing-center/automation/rebuild`

Rebuilds all automated marketing materials, regenerating templates and assets.

`POST /v1/marketing-center/create-image`

Generates a custom marketing image (flyer, social post, etc.) from a template with property data.

get.description:
`GET /v1/marketing-center/download-counter/{id}`

Returns the download count for a marketing asset.

`GET /v1/marketing-center/generate-wrapped`

Generates a year-end Wrapped-style summary report for agent marketing.

post.description:
`POST /v1/marketing-center/generate-wrapped/webhook`

Handles async callback when a Wrapped report generation completes.

get.description:
`GET /v1/marketing-center/get-templates`

Returns all available marketing templates with preview images and configuration.

post.description:
`POST /v1/marketing-center/rebuild-agent-templates`

Regenerates all marketing templates for an agent with updated branding and property data.

`POST /v1/marketing-center/send-mms`

Sends a marketing MMS message with an image attachment to a recipient.

`POST /v1/marketing-center/submit-template/{id}`

Submits a completed marketing template for review or publishing.

get.description:
`GET /v1/marketing-center/template/{id}`

Retrieves a single marketing template by ID with configuration and preview.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/marketing-center/template/{id}`

Deletes a marketing template.

post.description:
`POST /v1/marketing-center/webhook/create-image`

Handles async callback when a marketing image generation completes.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/media/`

Deletes multiple media files in a single request.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/media/change-document-status`

Updates the status of a document (e.g., draft, approved, archived).

post.description:
`POST /v1/media/check-required-folders`

Ensures required folder structure exists for a deal's media storage. Creates missing folders.

`POST /v1/media/convert-webp-to-png`

Converts a WebP image to PNG format for compatibility with systems that don't support WebP.

`POST /v1/media/create-folder`

Creates a new folder in the media storage hierarchy for organizing files.

`POST /v1/media/moving`

Moves one or more media files to a different folder.

`POST /v1/media/remove-folder`

Deletes a media folder and optionally moves its contents to another folder.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/media/rename`

Renames a media file or folder.

post.description:
`POST /v1/media/share-document`

Generates a shareable link for a document or sends it to specified recipients.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/media/upload-document-as-data`

Uploads a document with structured metadata attached for processing and indexing.

post.description:
`POST /v1/media/upload-media`

Uploads a photo, video, or document file. Supports image optimization and thumbnail generation.

get.description:
`GET /v1/meetings/`

Returns all scheduled meetings with optional filtering by date, participant, or status.

post.description:
`POST /v1/meetings/`

Books a meeting between participants. Creates calendar entries and sends notifications.

get.description:
`GET /v1/meetings/available-calendars`

Returns calendars that have available time slots for booking meetings.

post.description:
`POST /v1/migrations/rma-statuses`

Internal migration — updates RMA records to use the latest status taxonomy. Admin only.

`POST /v1/notifications/send`

Sends a notification to one or more users via their preferred channel (push, SMS, email, or in-app).

get.description:
`GET /v1/notifications/upsert-novu-subscribers`

Syncs platform users to Novu notification service as subscribers for push and in-app notifications.

post.description:
`POST /v1/notifications/wu-reminder`

Sends a reminder notification to contractors who haven't submitted their weekly renovation progress update.

get.description:
`GET /v1/onsite-visit/`

Returns all onsite visits with optional filtering by deal, date range, status, or assignee.

post.description:
`POST /v1/onsite-visit/mobile-geolocation`

Records the GPS location of a mobile user during an onsite visit for verification and tracking.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/onsite-visit/{onSiteVisitId}`

Updates fields on an onsite visit — date, status, notes, or assigned team member.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/onsite-visit/{onSiteVisitId}`

Cancels and deletes a scheduled onsite visit.

post.description:
`POST /v1/onsite-visit/{sessionId}/comment`

Adds a comment to an onsite visit session. Comments are visible to all participants.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/onsite-visit/{sessionId}/comment/{commentId}`

Deletes a comment from an onsite visit session.

get.description:
`GET /v1/onsite-visit/{sessionId}/comments`

Returns all comments for an onsite visit session in chronological order.

post.description:
`POST /v1/onsite-visit/{sessionId}/image-notes`

Adds an annotated photo note to an onsite visit — captures a photo with markup and text notes.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/onsite-visit/{sessionId}/image-notes/{imageNoteId}`

Updates the text or annotations on an existing image note.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/onsite-visit/{sessionId}/image-notes/{imageNoteId}`

Deletes an image note from an onsite visit session.

post.description:
`POST /v1/partners/realtycom`

Handles incoming referral data from the Realty.com partner integration.

`POST /v1/predictions/`

Starts an async AI image generation job. Returns a job ID to poll for completion.

get.description:
`GET /v1/predictions/{id}`

Polls an AI prediction job. Returns generated images when complete. Poll every few seconds.

post.description:
`POST /v1/production/`

Returns production deployment status and version information.

`POST /v1/project-scopes/`

Creates a new project scope for a deal with initial line items.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/project-scopes/`

Removes scope items from a project. Supports filtering by source type for selective removal.

parameters.name: dealId
parameters.description: Deal ID to fill scope for.

get.description:
`GET /v1/project-scopes/fill-from-pandadoc/{dealId}`

Populates project scope by extracting line items from the signed PandaDoc document.

isInPunchList.description: Whether to include in punch list.

verified.description: Whether the item is verified complete.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/project-scopes/update`

Updates a single project scope item.

rejectedReason.description: Reason for prior rejection, if re-creating.

post.description:
`POST /v1/property/`

Creates a new property record and initiates analysis. Main entry point for the property assessment flow.

`POST /v1/property/admin/migrate-latest-leads-to-reports-meta`

Internal migration — updates leads with latest report metadata. Admin only.

`POST /v1/property/admin/migrate-leads`

Internal migration — converts legacy property lead records. Admin only.

`POST /v1/property/association`

Creates an association between a report and a HubSpot custom object.

`POST /v1/property/complete-report`

Marks a report as complete and triggers final processing including PDF generation.

`POST /v1/property/create-comparable`

Manually adds a comparable to a report.

`POST /v1/property/log/comparable/{reportId}`

Logs an analytics event when comparables are viewed.

`POST /v1/property/log/pdf/{reportId}`

Logs an analytics event when a report PDF is downloaded.

`POST /v1/property/log/view/{reportId}`

Logs an analytics event when a report is viewed.

post.summary: Create neighborhood report and register user

contact.description: Object with firstname, lastname, email, phone.

post.description:
`POST /v1/property/neighborhood-report-and-register-user`

Creates a neighborhood report and registers the requesting user.

`POST /v1/property/search-comparable`

Searches for comparable properties near a given address.

`POST /v1/property/share/{reportId}`

Generates a shareable link or sends an invite for a property report.

`POST /v1/property/upgrade-to-v2`

Upgrades a legacy V1 report to V2 format with enhanced analysis.

get.description:
`GET /v1/property/{id}`

Retrieves a property report with valuation data, condition assessment, comparables, and renovation recommendations.

post.description:
`POST /v1/property/{id}/recalculate`

Recalculates a property report with updated comparables, timeline, or renovation parameters.

submittedById.description: User ID who submitted the update.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/punch-list/update-punch-data`

Updates punch list items and status.

post.description:
`POST /v1/punch-list/update-tasks`

Batch updates task statuses on the punch list.

get.description:
`GET /v1/punch-list/{dealId}`

Retrieves the punch list — all outstanding items before project completion.

post.description:
`POST /v1/realtors/`

Creates a new realtor contact profile.

get.description:
`GET /v1/realtors/{contactId}`

Retrieves a realtor's profile by contact ID.

`GET /v1/referrals/`

Returns all referral records with optional filtering.

post.description:
`POST /v1/referrals/`

Creates a new referral record for lead attribution.

`POST /v1/referrals/update-user-visit`

Logs a visit event for referral tracking.

get.description:
`GET /v1/referrals/{dealId}`

Retrieves referral info for a deal.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/referrals/{dealId}`

Updates referral info for a deal.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/referrals/{dealId}`

Deletes a referral record.

example.prompt: Modern white kitchen with marble countertops

post.description:
`POST /v1/reimagine/create-image`

Generates an AI-reimagined version of a property photo with a specified room style.

`POST /v1/reimagine/report-association`

Links a reimagined image to a property report.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/reimagine/{id}`

Updates metadata on a reimagine record.

get.description:
`GET /v1/reimagine/{id}`

Retrieves a reimagined image result.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/reimagine/{id}`

Deletes a reimagined image.

onSchedule.description: Whether the project is on schedule.

completed.description: Array of scope item IDs completed this week.

post.description:
`POST /v1/renovation-progress/`

Creates a weekly renovation progress update for a project.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/renovation-progress/what-was-done/{dealId}`

Updates the free-text summary of work completed.

get.description:
`GET /v1/renovation-progress/{renovationProgressId}`

Retrieves a single weekly update.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/renovation-progress/{renovationProgressId}`

Modifies a weekly update — schedule status, completed items, or notes.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/renovation-progress/{renovationProgressId}`

Deletes a weekly update.

post.description:
`POST /v1/reports/`

Generates an annual or periodic analytics report.

get.description:
`GET /v1/ret-catalog/`

Returns all products in the renovation catalog with pricing.

post.description:
`POST /v1/ret-catalog/`

Adds a new product to the renovation catalog.

get.description:
`GET /v1/ret-catalog/all-product-types`

Returns all product type categories.

`GET /v1/ret-catalog/{productId}`

Retrieves a product by ID.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/ret-catalog/{productId}`

Updates a catalog product.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/ret-catalog/{productId}`

Removes a product from the catalog.

get.description:
`GET /v1/ret-catalog/{productTypeId}/options`

Returns options for a product type (e.g., countertop materials for kitchen).

`GET /v1/ret-catalog/{productTypeId}/options/{optionId}/selections`

Returns selections for an option (e.g., granite colors).

example.note: Initial RMA for kitchen and bathroom renovation

post.description:
`POST /v1/rma/`

Creates a new Renovation Management Agreement. Triggers notifications and sets up the contract pipeline.

get.description:
`GET /v1/rma/`

Returns all RMAs with optional filtering by status, deal, or contractor.

`GET /v1/rma/contracts`

Returns all RMA contract documents across projects.

post.description:
`POST /v1/rma/contracts/{contractId}/session`

Creates an edit or signing session for an RMA contract.

get.description:
`GET /v1/rma/{rmaId}`

Retrieves an RMA by ID including contract status, activity logs, draw history, and notes.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/rma/{rmaId}`

Updates RMA fields — status, amount, draw information, or metadata.

get.description:
`GET /v1/rma/{rmaId}/activity-logs`

Returns the audit log for an RMA including status changes, contract events, and draws.

post.description:
`POST /v1/rma/{rmaId}/contract`

Creates a new contract document for the RMA via PandaDoc.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/rma/{rmaId}/contract`

Deletes the RMA contract. Only drafts can be deleted.

get.description:
`GET /v1/rma/{rmaId}/contract/download`

Downloads the RMA contract as a PDF.

`GET /v1/rma/{rmaId}/contract/edit-session`

Creates or retrieves an edit session for the RMA contract.

post.description:
`POST /v1/rma/{rmaId}/contract/send`

Sends the RMA contract to all recipients for e-signature.

example.note: Contractor requested schedule extension — approved by PM.

post.description:
`POST /v1/rma/{rmaId}/notes`

Adds a note to the RMA's activity feed.

get.description:
`GET /v1/rma/{rmaId}/notes`

Retrieves all notes for an RMA in chronological order.

example.content: Unable to access estimate for deal #12345

post.description:
`POST /v1/support/`

Submits a new support ticket with contact info and issue details.

`POST /v1/utility/check-home-images`

Multi-source home image lookup by address. Queries AnyProp, Zillow, RestB, deduplicates results.

`POST /v1/utility/deduplicate-images`

Detects and removes duplicate images using perceptual hashing. Returns only unique images.

`POST /v1/utility/house-canary/market-health`

Retrieves market health indicators for given ZIP codes using House Canary.

get.description:
`GET /v1/vision-ai/`

Returns all Vision AI property analysis reports.

rejected.description: Whether this is a re-submission after rejection.

post.description:
`POST /v1/vision-ai/`

Creates a new AI property analysis report from photos.

`POST /v1/vision-ai/finish-neighborhood-report`

Completes a neighborhood report and optionally saves photos.

`POST /v1/vision-ai/neighbor-report-and-register`

Creates a neighborhood report and registers the user.

`POST /v1/vision-ai/neighbor-report-photos`

Processes and analyzes photos for a neighborhood report.

`POST /v1/vision-ai/neighbor-report-with-photos-finish`

Completes a neighborhood report that includes photo analysis.

`POST /v1/vision-ai/search`

Searches Vision AI reports by address or other criteria.

`POST /v1/vision-ai/upgrade-to-v2`

Upgrades a V1 Vision AI report to V2 format.

get.description:
`GET /v1/vision-ai/{id}`

Retrieves a Vision AI report by ID.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v1/vision-ai/{id}`

Updates fields on a Vision AI report.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v1/vision-ai/{id}`

Deletes a Vision AI report.

viewOnly.description: When true, returns results without saving.

post.description:
`POST /v1/vision-ai/{id}/recalculate`

Recalculates a report with updated timeline or parameters.

`POST /v1/webhooks/affiliate-partners`

Handles incoming referral data from affiliate partners. Called by partner systems.

`POST /v1/webhooks/gvg`

Handles incoming data from GVG for property valuation updates.

`POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/createCompany`

Handles HubSpot workflow action to create a company record.

`POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/invite-realtor`

Handles HubSpot workflow to invite a realtor to the platform.

`POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/production`

Handles production events from HubSpot workflows.

`POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/report-reminder/{emailId}`

Sends report reminder emails.

`POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/revive-team`

Handles HubSpot actions for internal team notifications.

`POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/updateCompany`

Handles HubSpot workflow to update company records.

`POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/updateContractor`

Handles HubSpot workflow to sync contractor data.

`POST /v1/webhooks/hubspot/updateRealtorEdgeUrl`

Handles HubSpot workflow to update a realtor's Edge URL.

`POST /v1/webhooks/pandadoc/linked-objects`

Handles PandaDoc events for document-object associations.

`POST /v1/webhooks/pandadoc/project-scope`

Handles PandaDoc events to sync project scope items from signed documents.

`POST /v1/webhooks/website-case-study`

Receives case study data from the marketing website.

`POST /v2/analyze/comparables`

Retrieves comparable sales data based on address and condition score.

recommendations.description: Cabinets show significant wear — recommend full replacement
Tile grout needs replacement, fixtures dated

imageUrls.description: Array of image URLs to analyze.

post.description:
`POST /v2/analyze/condition`

Submits property photos for AI condition analysis. Returns condition score, features, and renovation recommendations.

`POST /v2/analyze/create-report`

Generates a full property analysis report with condition assessment, comparables, market data, and renovation recommendations.

`POST /v2/analyze/feedback/{id}`

Submits feedback on an analysis report.

`POST /v2/analyze/photos`

Analyzes photos to identify rooms, features, and condition issues without a full report.

`POST /v2/analyze/reanalyze`

Re-runs analysis with updated comparable properties.

get.description:
`GET /v2/analyze/renovation/{id}`

Retrieves renovation-specific analysis with recommendations and ROI projections.

post.description:
`POST /v2/analyze/v2/comparables`

Enhanced comparable lookup using V2 analysis engine with improved matching.

get.description:
`GET /v2/calendars/`

Returns all configured calendars for scheduling.

clienttimeout.description: Timeout in ms for booking operations.

post.description:
`POST /v2/calendars/`

Creates a new calendar configuration.

get.description:
`GET /v2/calendars/{calendarId}`

Retrieves a calendar by ID.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v2/calendars/{calendarId}`

Updates calendar configuration.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v2/calendars/{calendarId}`

Deletes a calendar.

dealname.description: Display name, typically the property address.

post.description:
`POST /v2/deals/`

Creates a new deal in the HubSpot pipeline. Deals are routed to the appropriate pipeline and stage based on deal type.

get.description:
`GET /v2/opportunities/`

Returns a paginated list of all opportunities. Supports filtering by status, deal type, and assignee.

`GET /v2/opportunities/admin/{adminId}`

Returns opportunities assigned to a specific admin user.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}`

Updates fields on an opportunity — stage, amount, notes, or custom properties.

get.description:
`GET /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}`

Retrieves a single opportunity with contacts, property data, estimates, and status history.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}`

Deletes an opportunity. Requires the associated contact ID for cleanup.

post.description:
`POST /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}/associate-contact`

Links an existing contact to an opportunity.

`POST /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}/create-and-associate-contact`

Creates a new contact and associates it with the opportunity in one call.

`POST /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}/disassociate-contact`

Removes the link between a contact and an opportunity.

get.description:
`GET /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}/onsite-visit`

Retrieves the onsite visit for this opportunity.

post.description:
`POST /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}/onsite-visit`

Schedules a new onsite visit for this opportunity's property.

`POST /v2/payments/reno/create-checkout-session`

Creates a Stripe checkout session. Returns a URL to redirect the user to Stripe's hosted checkout.

`POST /v2/payments/reno/payment-intents`

Creates a Stripe payment intent for a one-time renovation payment.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v2/payments/reno/remove-subscription`

Cancels an active Stripe subscription for the authenticated user.

get.description:
`GET /v2/payments/reno/user-subscription`

Retrieves the current subscription status for the authenticated user.

post.description:
`POST /v2/payments/reno/webhook`

Handles incoming Stripe webhook events. Called by Stripe, not by your application.

get.description:
`GET /v2/properties/{objectType}`

Retrieves all custom property definitions for a HubSpot object type.

`GET /v2/properties/{objectType}/{propertyName}`

Retrieves a single property definition by name.

clientSituation.description: Description of client's situation and needs.

post.description:
`POST /v2/referrals/`

Creates a referral with additional client situation data.

`POST /v2/users/`

Creates a new platform user with role-based access.

get.description:
`GET /v2/users/`

Returns all platform users with optional filtering by role.

`GET /v2/users/owners`

Returns users designated as HubSpot owners — used for deal assignment.

`GET /v2/users/{uid}`

Retrieves a user profile by Firebase UID including role, permissions, and activity.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v2/users/{uid}`

Updates profile fields for a user. Only included fields are modified.

delete.description:
`DELETE /v2/users/{uid}`

Soft-deletes a user — marks as deleted but retains for audit.

post.description:
`POST /v2/vision-ai/`

Creates a V2 property analysis report with enhanced AI capabilities.

`POST /v2/vision-ai/condition`

Enhanced AI condition analysis with improved accuracy.

patch.description:
`PATCH /v2/vision-ai/custom-object/{recordId}`

Updates a HubSpot custom object record for a Vision AI report.

id.description: Report ID to add images to.

post.description:
`POST /v2/vision-ai/images`

Processes and uploads images for a V2 Vision AI report.

`POST /v2/vision-ai/rejected-report-note/{recordId}`

Adds a note explaining why a report was rejected.

csv.description: CSV data object for batch processing.

post.description:
`POST /v2/vision-ai/scraper`

Runs the property data scraper for Vision AI reports.

get.description:
`GET /v2/vision-ai/scraper/csv`

Exports scraper results as a CSV file.

post.description:
`POST /v2/vision-ai/scraper/generate-report`

Generates a full report from scraped property data.

tags.name: System
tags.description: Health checks and system status endpoints.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication and session management. All auth endpoints use Firebase for identity verification.

tags.name: Admins
tags.description: Manage admin users — update profiles, emails, and permissions.

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Agent operations — search agents, retrieve opportunities, and manage agent-related data.

tags.name: Contacts
tags.description: Create, search, and manage contacts associated with deals and opportunities.

tags.name: Contractors
tags.description: Contractor management — profiles, assignments, dashboards, and contractor-related operations.

tags.name: Estimates
tags.description: Create, update, duplicate, and manage renovation estimates and change orders with line items from the product catalog.

tags.name: Opportunities
tags.description: Deal opportunities — create, update, associate contacts, track status, and manage onsite visits.

tags.name: Deals
tags.description: Deal creation and pipeline management in HubSpot.

tags.name: Property
tags.description: Property data — lookups, valuations, images, reports, comparables, and property-related analytics.

tags.name: Homes
tags.description: Home records — create, retrieve, and manage home details and associated property data.

tags.name: Vision Ai
tags.description: AI-powered property analysis — condition reports, photo analysis, neighborhood reports, scraping tools, and renovation recommendations.

tags.name: Analyze
tags.description: Property analysis tools — AI condition assessment, comparable property lookup, photo analysis, and full report generation.

tags.name: Rma
tags.description: Renovation Management Agreements — create, manage, track contracts, handle draws, and manage signing workflows.

tags.name: Contracts
tags.description: Document contracts — creation, signing sessions, status tracking, and PandaDoc integration.

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Payment processing via Stripe — checkout sessions, subscriptions, payment intents, and webhook handling.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Platform user management — create, retrieve, update, and delete users with role-based access.

tags.name: Calendars
tags.description: Calendar management — scheduling, availability, and calendar configuration for meetings and onsite visits.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Inbound webhook handlers for HubSpot, PandaDoc, affiliate partners, and other third-party integrations.

tags.name: Media
tags.description: File and media management — upload, retrieve, organize, and delete photos, documents, and attachments.

tags.name: Referrals
tags.description: Referral tracking — create, update, and manage referral records and attribution across deal types.

tags.name: Ret Catalog
tags.description: Renovation product catalog — browse product types, options, selections, and pricing for estimates.

tags.name: Marketing Center
tags.description: Marketing tools — flyers, brochures, campaigns, and marketing material management for agents.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Push notifications and in-app messaging — send targeted alerts to users across platforms.

tags.name: Onsite Visits
tags.description: Onsite visit scheduling, tracking, and management for property inspections and contractor walkthroughs.

tags.name: Project Scopes
tags.description: Project scope management — line items, scope changes, and renovation project tracking.

tags.name: Broadcast
tags.description: Broadcast messaging — send communications to groups of users via SMS, email, or push notifications.

tags.name: WeeklyUpdates
tags.description: Weekly renovation progress updates — create, view, edit, and delete update reports for active projects.

tags.name: Utility
tags.description: Utility endpoints — multi-source home image lookups, image deduplication, and market health checks.

tags.name: Predictions
tags.description: AI image generation — create and poll async prediction jobs for material and design visualizations.

tags.name: Reimagine
tags.description: AI-powered home reimagining — generate design visualizations and renovation previews using AI image generation.

tags.name: AppConfigs
tags.description: Application configuration — feature flags and app settings per platform (dashboard, admin, mobile).

tags.name: Automated Valuation Models
tags.description: Automated property valuation using third-party data sources.

tags.name: Brokerages
tags.description: Brokerage management — create, update, and manage real estate brokerage records and associations.

tags.name: Case Studies
tags.description: Case study management for marketing materials and website content.

tags.name: Esignatures
tags.description: Electronic signature management via PandaDoc — document status and signing workflows.

tags.name: Follow Up Boss
tags.description: Integration with Follow Up Boss CRM — sync contacts, leads, and deal data.

tags.name: Meetings
tags.description: Meeting scheduling — book, update, and manage meetings between agents, homeowners, and contractors.

tags.name: Migrations
tags.description: Data migration utilities for internal platform upgrades.

tags.name: Partners
tags.description: Partner management — affiliate and referral partner records.

tags.name: Production
tags.description: Production environment management and deployment status.

tags.name: Punch List
tags.description: Punch list management — track outstanding items and tasks for renovation project completion.

tags.name: Realtors
tags.description: Realtor profiles — create and retrieve realtor contact information.

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Report generation — annual reports, analytics exports, and data summaries.

tags.name: Support
tags.description: Support ticket submission — create tickets with contact details and issue descriptions.

tags.name: Properties
tags.description: HubSpot property definitions — retrieve custom property metadata for objects.
